raw_branches.text: Overbroad prompt triggers excessive branch-space fan-out (max lenses capped).
Lack of recursive ceilings allows infinite child subagent deepening loops.

deduped_branches.text: Overbroad user prompts ask for 'all possible reasons' and 'infinite critics', attempting to trigger exponential agent fan-out.
Lack of execution budget constraints allows recursive subagent spawns to consume API tokens unchecked, leading to denial-of-wallet.

load_bearing_sent_to_refute.text: Relying on agents to naturally terminate recursive prompts without hard system caps.

refutations.evidence: Verification run proved that without hard process ceilings, open-ended loops will consume resources until rate-limiting occurs.
